name: Traceable Financial Planning Framework
purpose: Turn editable assumptions into startup-cost, cash-flow, break-even, runway, and scenario outputs that can be reviewed and corrected.
questionsToAsk: Which costs have quotes and which remain estimates?
What sales evidence supports the expected scenario?
How much cash remains after startup spending?
Which assumption most changes break-even or runway?
scoringModel: Score assumption completeness, quote coverage, revenue evidence, cash-flow visibility, scenario coverage, and sensitivity testing.
Require every calculated number to trace to an input or stated assumption.
Reduce confidence when expected revenue lacks pilot evidence.
Flag negative runway and unresolved funding gaps.
qualityChecks: Include conservative, expected, and optimistic scenarios.
Keep tax values labeled as placeholders.
warnings: Financial projections are estimates, not promises.
Tax placeholders are not tax advice.
